recordBurn(uint256).details: This allows accurate daily cap enforcement

params._highVolumeThreshold: Above this daily volume = high (fees decrease)
params._lowVolumeThreshold: Below this daily volume = low (fees increase)

params._dailyBurnCap: Maximum tokens to burn per day (0 = unlimited)
params._ecosystemMinBps: Minimum ecosystem fee in basis points
params._minimumSupplyFloor: Supply floor below which burns pause (0 = no floor)

acceptOwnership().notice: Complete ownership transfer (must be called by pending owner)

burnsPaused().notice: Check if burns should be paused (supply floor reached)

computeFees(address,address,uint256).notice: Compute dynamic burn, Sanctum, and Ecosystem fees based on ProofScore Called by VFIDEToken during transfers

getEffectiveBurnRate(address).notice: Get effective fee rates for a user (using linear curve)

getFeeForScore(uint16).notice: Get total fee percentage for a given score (for frontend display)

getVolumeMultiplier().notice: Get current volume multiplier based on daily activity

previewFees(address,uint256).notice: Preview fees for a given user and amount

recordBurn(uint256).notice: Update daily burn tracking (called by token after transfer)

recordVolume(uint256).notice: Record transfer volume (called by token after transfer)

setToken(address).notice: Set token reference for supply checking
